# Appendix {#sec-appendix}

## A.1 Source Code Repositories

The complete source code for the UpHeal system is distributed across the following GitHub repositories:

| Repository | Description | URL |
|-----------|-------------|-----|
| UpHeal-Doc | Thesis documentation, Quarto project, and all writing | <https://github.com/Upheal1/UpHeal-Doc> |
| UpHeal-Backend | Python FastAPI backend, microservices, AI pipeline | <https://github.com/Upheal1/UpHeal-Backend> |
| UpHeal-Frontend | Flutter mobile application | <https://github.com/Upheal1/UpHeal-Frontend> |
| UpHeal-Admin | Therapist dashboard (planned) | <https://github.com/Upheal1/UpHeal-Admin> |

All repositories are licensed under the MIT License.

## A.2 Project Structure

The thesis project follows this directory layout:

```
UpHeal-Doc/
├── _quarto.yml              # Quarto book configuration
├── index.qmd                 # Cover page
├── acknowledgements.qmd      # Acknowledgements
├── references.bib            # IEEE-formatted bibliography
├── chapters/
│   ├── 01-introduction.qmd
│   ├── 02-background.qmd
│   ├── 03-methodology.qmd
│   ├── 04-results-discussions.qmd
│   ├── 05-conclusions.qmd
│   └── appendix.qmd
├── diagrams/                 # External diagrams (draw.io, etc.)
├── images/                   # Generated chart images
├── scripts/
│   └── generate_charts.py    # Chart generation script
├── results/                  # CSV result files for charts
├── styles/
│   └── ieee.csl              # IEEE citation style
├── output/                   # Rendered PDF/DOCX output
└── docs/                     # Team documentation
    ├── PLAN.md
    ├── PROGRESS.md
    ├── SYNC_PLAN.md
    ├── BRANCH_STRATEGY.md
    ├── STYLE_GUIDE.md
    ├── TEAM_ASSIGNMENTS.md
    ├── SPRINT_48H.md
    └── CHANGELOG.md
```

## A.3 Reproducing Charts

The charts in @sec-results-discussions are generated from the `scripts/generate_charts.py` script. To reproduce:

```bash
# Install dependencies
pip install matplotlib numpy pandas

# Generate charts
python scripts/generate_charts.py

# Rebuild the thesis
quarto render
```

The script supports reading from CSV files in the `results/` directory. If CSV files are present, they take precedence over hardcoded defaults. Format:

- `results/emotion_accuracy.csv`: Columns: `emotion`, `precision`, `recall`, `f1`
- `results/retention_weeks.csv`: Columns: `week`, `retention_pct`
- `results/response_latency.csv`: Columns: `component`, `latency_ms`

## A.4 Database Schema

The backend uses Supabase PostgreSQL with the following key tables:

| Table | Purpose | Key Columns |
|-------|---------|-------------|
| `profiles` | User profiles | `id`, `display_name`, `level`, `xp_total`, `streak_count` |
| `chat_messages` | Conversation history | `id`, `user_id`, `role`, `content`, `emotion_label`, `safety_status` |
| `assessments` | Clinical assessments | `id`, `user_id`, `assessment_type`, `score`, `severity`, `created_at` |
| `journal_entries` | User journaling | `id`, `user_id`, `title`, `content`, `mood_rating` |
| `badges` | Earned badges | `id`, `user_id`, `badge_id`, `earned_at` |
| `achievements` | Unlocked achievements | `id`, `user_id`, `achievement_id`, `progress`, `unlocked_at` |
| `challenges` | Active challenges | `id`, `user_id`, `challenge_id`, `progress`, `expires_at` |
| `crisis_reports` | Safety audit log | `id`, `user_id`, `trigger_text`, `action_taken`, `created_at` |

Row-level security (RLS) policies ensure that each user can only access their own data.

## A.5 API Endpoints

The FastAPI backend exposes the following key endpoints:

| Method | Endpoint | Purpose |
|--------|----------|---------|
| `POST` | `/api/chat` | Send message, receive LLM response with emotion label |
| `GET` | `/api/chat/history` | Retrieve conversation history |
| `POST` | `/api/assess` | Submit GAD-7/PHQ-9 assessment |
| `GET` | `/api/assess/history` | Retrieve assessment history |
| `POST` | `/api/journal` | Create journal entry |
| `GET` | `/api/journal/entries` | List journal entries |
| `GET` | `/api/roadmap` | Get personalized wellness roadmap |
| `GET` | `/api/gamification/profile` | Get XP, level, badges, achievements |
| `POST` | `/api/crisis/report` | Submit crisis detection report |

All endpoints require JWT authentication via Bearer token. The gateway enforces rate limiting (10 requests per minute on `/api/assess`, 30 requests per minute on `/api/chat`).

## A.6 Publication

No publications have resulted from this project at the time of submission. Future publications may target venues such as:

- ACM Conference on Human-Computer Interaction (CHI)
- Journal of Medical Internet Research (JMIR)
- IEEE Conference on Artificial Intelligence (CAI)
